attacker.label: A_rng

observedRangeReporter.formulaPath: doAction() updates stats.{side}.minActionDmg/maxActionDmg from realized actionRaw across sampled trials
observedRangeReporter.concept: observed realized positive action range before HP-cap application

compiledRangeReporter.formulaPath: predictPosActionRangeFromWeaponMinMax(compiled weapon min/max, target armor, armor config)

attacker.differenceReason: runtime observed range and compiled predicted range agree for this matchup at the current trial set

defender.label: D_rng

observedRangeReporter.formulaPath: doAction() updates stats.{side}.minActionDmg/maxActionDmg from realized actionRaw across sampled trials
observedRangeReporter.concept: observed realized positive action range before HP-cap application

compiledRangeReporter.formulaPath: predictPosActionRangeFromWeaponMinMax(compiled weapon min/max, target armor, armor config)

defender.differenceReason: observedRangeReporter is sample-based runtime output; compiledRangeReporter is a theoretical predictor, so they can disagree without implying a runtime combat-path mismatch

defender.label: D_rng
